hero.title:
Inpatient Charts,
Digitized
hero.subtitle: Everything you need for veterinary inpatient management in one platform. Charting, drug calculations, and treatment tracking.

problem.title:
Still spending hours
on paper charts?
problem.subtitle: Is your inpatient management really working?

items.title: Inefficient Workflow
items.description: Write paper chart → Take photo → Upload to EMR. This repetitive 3-step process eats up your time.

items.title: Risk of Missed Treatments
items.description: In a busy ward, missing a treatment or medication directly impacts patient safety.

items.title: Drug & Fluid Calculation Burden
items.description: Manual weight-based dosing and fluid rate calculations every time. A heavy burden for less experienced vets.

items.title: Insurance Claim Difficulties
items.description: Different terminology across clinics, unclear inpatient vs. outpatient distinction. Unnecessary friction with insurers.

solution.title:
Inpatient management,
transformed
solution.subtitle: Beyond the limits of paper charts — a safer, more efficient clinical environment.

items.title: Access Anywhere, Anytime
items.description: Cloud-based access from PC, tablet, or mobile. View and edit charts wherever you are.

items.title: Zero Missed Treatments
items.description: Time-based treatment checklists and task alerts ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

items.title: Auto Drug & Fluid Calculation
items.description: Enter patient weight, get instant dosage and fluid rate calculations. Safe for all experience levels.

items.title: Streamlined Workflow
items.description: Replace the 3-step paper→photo→EMR process with instant digital recording.

insurance.title:
Insurance claims,
made simple
insurance.subtitle: Standardized treatment codes and automatic classification dramatically reduce processing time.

items.title: Auto Code Mapping
items.description: Each treatment is automatically assigned a standard code, instantly matching insurer requirements.

items.title: Unified Terminology
items.description: Map clinic-specific terms to standard codes, eliminating communication friction with insurers.

items.title: Auto Inpatient/Outpatient Tagging
items.description: Treatment records are automatically tagged, preventing confusion during insurance review.

steps.title: Sign Up & Register Clinic
steps.description: Quick registration, then configure your clinic info and treatment items.

steps.title: Create Inpatient Chart
steps.description: Register a patient and create an inpatient chart with a time-based grid ready to go.

steps.title: Record Treatments in Real-Time
steps.description: Log treatments, vitals, and medications in real-time and share with your team.
